release_notes: Probe stdio reliability fix. 0.3.69 timeout dumps came back 0/0 bytes for both custom chrome.exe at C:\Program Files and managed tomeanty.5 — chrome was running for the full 60s but our file-descriptor inheritance through Node spawn wasn't catching its output. Probe now writes a .cmd wrapper that runs chrome with shell redirection (> stdout.html 2> stderr.log) and spawns cmd.exe on it. Capture is guaranteed. Trimmed --no-zygote / --disable-software-rasterizer (could wedge headless), added --enable-logging=stderr --v=1 so chrome writes its own startup logs. UI: truncate label + whitespace-nowrap on the live phase counter so the panel stops jumping between 1 and 2 lines.
